title: Cable Lock with 4-Digit Combination Lock, Cable Combination Padlocks with 130cm Retractable Cables, for Bike Luggage Helmet Ski Locks
features: High-Quality Materials: The cable locks are made of a combination of ABS, PVC-coated steel cable, and sturdy alloy steel for excellent strength and abrasion resistance. It is durable and will not damage your belongings or vehicle paint

Thicker Steel Cable for Enhanced Security: Our 130cm (4.27ft) retractable cable lock comes with a 0.2cm (3/32") steel wire rope, which is stronger and more cut-resistant than ordinary steel cables. Your belongings will remain securely locked even in demanding situations

Customizable 4-digit combination: Set your own 4-digit combination with 10,000 possible options. This lock provides an effective security system, allowing you to choose a personal combination that is easy to remember but difficult for others to guess
Button Retraction for Easy Use: The push-button retraction system ensures that the cable retracts smoothly and easily, saving you time and hassle while keeping the cable neatly stored when not in use

Versatile lock with a wide range of uses: Perfect for protecting a variety of items such as bicycles, scooters, motorcycles, luggage, and more. The adjustable cable allows you to lock and protect different valuables, whether at home, while traveling, or on the go
description: What are the advantages of our cable lock? 1. High-quality materials: This cable lock is made of ABS and PVC coated multi-strand steel wire, which has excellent durability and wear resistance. 2. Thickened cable: This lock uses 0.2 cm (3/32 inch) thick steel wire, which has excellent cut resistance and provides stronger protection than many other locks. The 130 cm (4.27 feet) long retractable cable is long enough for multiple uses, perfect for protecting your most valuable items. 3. Create your own security code: This 4-digit combination lock has 10,000 possible combinations, giving you the flexibility to set your own unique combination. You can change the combination at any time to ensure that your belongings are protected by the new combination. 4. Push-button retraction mechanism: The cable lock is equipped with a push-button retraction system, which allows you to easily reel the cable back into the housing after use. This feature ensures that your lock will not get tangled and can be easily stored in a bag or pocket. 5. Wide application: This lock comes with an adjustable steel cable, which is perfect for protecting a variety of items, from bicycles and scooters to helmets and luggage. Features: Material: ABS, PVC, Alloy Steel Color: Black Dimensions: 95 x 65 x 21 mm (3.74 x 2.60 x 0.83 in), Cable Length 130 cm (4.27 ft) Package Includes: 1 x Cable Lock Warm Tips: The size is measured manually; please allow slight errors. Due to the monitor color settings, the actual color may be slightly different from the online pictures; please refer to the actual product. Thank you for your understanding.
